name: io.github.danishashko/edgar-mcp
description: SEC EDGAR filings (10-K, 10-Q, 8-K), XBRL financials, and full-text filing search. No API key.
title: SEC EDGAR

environmentVariables.name: SEC_USER_AGENT
environmentVariables.description: Descriptive User-Agent with contact info required by the SEC, e.g. 'your-app your@email.com'
